briefdescription.para: Generate a software event in the Event Link Controller.

detaileddescription.para: This function requests the Renesas ELC to generate a software event identified by event.

parameterdescription.para: The Event Link Controller device.
Software event ID to generate.

simplesect.para: A negative errno code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t peripheral, uint32_t event)
memberdef.name: renesas_elc_link_set

briefdescription.para: Create a single event link.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures an event link by associating a peripheral with a specific event signal.

parameterdescription.para: Event Link Controller device.
Peripheral ID to be linked to the event signal.
Event signal ID to be associated with the peripheral.

simplesect.para: A negative errno code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Break an event link.

detaileddescription.para: This function breaks an existing event link for the given peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Event Link Controller device.
Peripheral ID whose link is to be broken.

simplesect.para: A negative errno code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Enable the operation of the Event Link Controller.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the ELC so that it can process events.

parameterdescription.para: Event Link Controller device.

simplesect.para: A negative errno code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Disable the operation of the Event Link Controller.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the ELC, stopping event processing.

parameterdescription.para: Event Link Controller device.

simplesect.para: A negative errno code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by index.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name, or return NULL if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by index, or return NULL if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by index for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance, or return NULL if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the device pointer from the "renesas-elcs" property by index for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance, or return NULL if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by index.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by index, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value by element name for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value by index for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value by element name for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Get the peripheral cell value by index for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by index.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by element name, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value from the "renesas-elcs" property by index, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value by element name for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value by index for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value by element name for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name as specified in the renesas-elcs-names property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Get the event cell value by index for a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance, or return a default value if the property does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into the renesas-elcs property.
Value to return if the property is not present.

briefdescription.para: Interfaces for Renesas Event Link Controller (ELC).
